formulas.name: 1. Goodwill Formula
formulas.formula: Goodwill = (Profits earned in the last year / Average Profit) × Number of years
formulas.variables: Profits earned in the last year, Average Profit, Number of years

formulas.name: 2. Adjustment for Change in Profit Sharing Ratio
formulas.formula: Adjustment = (Change in profit × New ratio) - (Change in profit × Old ratio)
formulas.variables: Change in profit, New ratio, Old ratio

formulas.name: 3. Revaluation of Assets and Liabilities
formulas.formula: Revalued Assets = Original Assets + (Original Assets × (New Value / Original Value))
formulas.variables: Original Assets, New Value, Original Value

formulas.name: 4. Calculation of Revaluation Reserves
formulas.formula: Revaluation Reserves = Revaluation Profit - Loss on Revaluation

formulas.name: 5. Accounting for Interest on Drawings
formulas.formula: Interest on Drawings = (Drawings × Rate of Interest × Time Period)
formulas.variables: Drawings, Rate of Interest, Time Period

formulas.name: 6. Adjustment for Interest on Drawings
formulas.formula: Adjustment = (Interest on Drawings × New Ratio) - (Interest on Drawings × Old Ratio)
formulas.variables: Interest on Drawings, New Ratio, Old Ratio

formulas.name: 7. Calculation of Partner's Capital Account
formulas.formula: Partner's Capital Account = Original Capital + (Original Capital × (New Ratio / Old Ratio))
formulas.variables: Original Capital, New Ratio, Old Ratio
